review: Terrible !! The API integration is so bad, tried the reset link three times and it says the account is activated and still can't place an order, will not waste time with this garbage. doesn't even deserve a one star in my opinion
When im about to pay this annoying app keeps showing message "Sorry we cannot process your order right now. Your card is not charged. Please contact crew at the store to proceed."!!!!!!!!😡😡😡
Point's expire??? why do they have to? all this time building them only for them to expire!!

If your McDonalds location is lacking in quality or missing large scale of menu items (I.E MCafe Beverages) you may not switch to a location that has it. This can lock you out of using certain rewards that you earn in the app. (Delivery Orders in the App)
